name: Healthcare Triangle, Inc.
business: Healthcare Triangle, Inc. is a healthcare information technology company focused on cloud services, data science, and professional and managed services for the Electronic Health Record (EHR), Healthcare and Life Sciences industry. It offers proprietary platforms including CloudEz, DataEz, Readabl.AI, Ziloy, and Ezovion, and provides services such as EHR implementation, optimization, managed services, and cloud hosting. The company serves healthcare delivery organizations, healthcare insurance companies, pharmaceutical and life sciences companies, biotech companies, and medical device manufacturers.
sellsTo: healthcare delivery organizations (hospitals, clinics, physician practices)
life sciences organizations (pharmaceutical and biotech companies)

exposures.sentence: We are a healthcare information technology company focused on advancing innovative industry-transforming solutions in the sectors of cloud services, data science, and professional and managed services for the Electronic Health Record (EHR), Healthcare and Life Sciences industry.
Our readabl.ai platform uses state-of-the-art public cloud artificial intelligence and machine learning to recognize and extract healthcare information from documents, faxes, and narrative reports.
Ziloy is an AI-powered mental wellness platform that delivers personalized mental health support through proprietary AI and GenAI-driven workflows.
Ezovion is a cloud-based hospital management platform that helps hospitals and clinics digitize their operations.

CloudEz platform has several security controls including identity & access management, cloud security & governance, data security, security information & event management, network and application security.

We currently serve the majority of our platform functions from third-party data center hosting facilities operated by Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure Cloud, and we primarily use shared servers in such facilities.

tamClaims.claim: The US healthcare cloud transformation services market is expected to grow to $35.8 billion by 2034 with 11.5% CAGR during the period 2026 to 2034 as per IMARC Group.
tamClaims.sentence: The US healthcare cloud transformation services market is expected to grow to $35.8 billion by 2034 with 11.5% CAGR during the period 2026 to 2034 as per IMARC Group (1).

tamClaims.claim: The global market for healthcare data science and analytics will be $266.03 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 25.6%.
tamClaims.sentence: SkyQuest business report estimates that the global market for healthcare data science and analytics will be $266.03 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 25.6% (2).

tamClaims.claim: The US healthcare IT services market is estimated to be $388.99 billion by 2030 with a CAGR 15.46%.
tamClaims.sentence: The US healthcare IT services market is estimated to be $388.99 billion by 2030 with a CAGR 15.46% as per Grand View Research (3).

tamClaims.claim: The artificial intelligence in the healthcare market valued $317.1 billion in 2032 with a CAGR of 37.1%.
tamClaims.sentence: The artificial intelligence in the healthcare market valued $ 317.1 billion in 2032 with a CAGR of 37.1% as per Global Market Insights (4).
